sql.query: SELECT ws.id AS stageId,ws.workflowId,ws.stageName,ws.sortOrder,ws.colour,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.targetDate,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status='complete' THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS openTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS overdueTaskCount,CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id)=0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'complete' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'overdue' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('in_progress','complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'in_progress' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='waiting' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'waiting' ELSE 'not_started' END AS stageStatus,(SELECT nt.id FROM tbl_tasks nt WHERE nt.workflowStageId=ws.id AND nt.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND nt.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') ORDER BY nt.dueDate IS NULL,nt.dueDate,FIELD(nt.priority,'urgent','high','normal','low'),nt.id LIMIT 1) AS nextTaskId,(SELECT nt.taskName FROM tbl_tasks nt WHERE nt.workflowStageId=ws.id AND nt.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND nt.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') ORDER BY nt.dueDate IS NULL,nt.dueDate,FIELD(nt.priority,'urgent','high','normal','low'),nt.id LIMIT 1) AS nextTaskName,(SELECT nt.dueDate FROM tbl_tasks nt WHERE nt.workflowStageId=ws.id AND nt.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND nt.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') ORDER BY nt.dueDate IS NULL,nt.dueDate,FIELD(nt.priority,'urgent','high','normal','low'),nt.id LIMIT 1) AS nextDueDate,(SELECT COALESCE(nu.displayName,ntm.teamName,nr.roleName,'Unassigned') FROM tbl_tasks nt LEFT JOIN tbl_users nu ON nu.id=nt.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams ntm ON ntm.id=nt.assignedToTeamId AND ntm.tenantId=nt.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_roles nr ON nr.id=nt.assignedToRoleId WHERE nt.workflowStageId=ws.id AND nt.tenantId=ws.tenantId AND nt.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') ORDER BY nt.dueDate IS NULL,nt.dueDate,FIELD(nt.priority,'urgent','high','normal','low'),nt.id LIMIT 1) AS nextAssignee FROM tbl_workflow_stages ws INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=ws.workflowId AND w.tenantId=ws.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId WHERE ws.tenantId=:tenantId AND w.status NOT IN ('complete','cancelled','archived') GROUP BY ws.id ORDER BY COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) DESC,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 END) DESC,w.targetDate IS NULL,w.targetDate,w.workflowName,ws.sortOrder
